announcements.title: Penpoint Has Officially Launched!
announcements.message: Penpoint is now officially available for purchase — but your beta copy is yours to keep, forever. Free, no strings attached. Here's what's ahead.

announcements.title: Help Shape Penpoint's Future!
announcements.message: We hope you're enjoying using Penpoint so far! As we get closer to launch, your feedback matters more than ever. Please take some time to fill out our beta tester survey — it'll help us understand your experience and prioritize what comes next.

announcements.title: Welcome to the Penpoint Beta!
announcements.message: Thank you for joining our beta program in 2026! Your feedback helps us build the best writing tool for tracking characters, locations, and items across your stories. We've made huge improvements since launch - enjoy exploring!

announcements.title: Welcome to the Penpoint Beta!
announcements.message: Thank you for being part of our beta program!
